goal: Drain the inbox strictly by weight: pipeline-integrity backlog first (load-time registrar clamp for discovered specs, ship staging surface, prefix-queue wiring salvage from preserved worktree cycle-975), then the operator-directed efficiency solutions — build the Go code-graph blast-radius feature per docs/architecture/code-graph-blast-radius.md (S1 tree-sitter graph, S2 impact API, S3 scout/audit wiring, measure token delta via telemetry) and close the token-telemetry coverage gaps (agy usage collector, claude relaunch attribution). Every fix: TDD red-first, regression test for the originating incident, adversarial audit, and a wiring proof in the composed production path. No inert API: every new exported surface ships with a caller and a naming test.
